architecture.coreArgument: Q2 execution validates the three-pillar strategy and earns the H2 acceleration ask before the competitive window closes in Q3

storytellingPattern.name: evidence → opportunity → urgency → ask
storytellingPattern.rationale: Executive audience responds to data-backed proposals with explicit ROI; urgency framing accelerates decision-making

actStructure.title: Establishing Credibility
actStructure.goal: Anchor the audience in Q2 success data — build trust before making the ask

actStructure.title: Deepening the Argument
actStructure.goal: Show each pillar's progress with enough detail to be convincing, not overwhelming

actStructure.title: Creating Urgency & Making the Ask
actStructure.goal: Transition from what we've done to what we need

architecture.openingHook: Q2 wasn't just a good quarter — it was proof the strategy works. Now we need to accelerate.
architecture.closingAnchor: The data says the strategy works. The market says the window is closing. The ask is $XM for H2.

cut.reason: Too granular for executive audience; available in appendix if requested
Pillar-level aggregation is sufficient for this audience

structuralScaffold.rationale: Executive audience benefits from a conclusion-first exec summary; 3 acts with ≥2 body slides each warrant section dividers; no backup data warrants an appendix

slides.title: Q2 Strategy Review
slides.transitionOut: Sets the frame — next slide previews the full story

slides.title: Executive Summary
slides.headlineMessage: Q2 execution validates our strategy; H2 acceleration requires $XM investment
supportingPoints: All three pillars on or ahead of plan
Competitive window closes Q3 — early mover advantage at stake
slides.transitionIn: From cover — here's the story in 60 seconds
slides.transitionOut: Into Act 1 detail — let me show you the numbers behind this

slides.title: Financial Highlights
slides.headlineMessage: Revenue exceeded targets by 3% — the strategy is paying off
slides.transitionOut: Numbers established → pivot to what drove them

mediaAttachments.rationale: Chart directly visualizes the revenue figures cited in supportingPoints

slides.title: Market Position
slides.headlineMessage: Our platform shift mirrors the industry's move from on-prem to cloud-native
supportingPoints: Industry cloud adoption curve shows inflection at 2024
Three competitor platforms already completed migration
slides.transitionIn: Financial proof established → now the strategic context
slides.transitionOut: Market position understood → into our strategic response

illustrationIntent.subject: Visual metaphor of an industry-wide migration: old infrastructure giving way to modern cloud architecture
illustrationIntent.narrativePurpose: The concept of an industry inflection point is abstract — a visual metaphor makes the strategic urgency tangible
